name: 道の駅 上天草さんぱーる
desc: 天草地域の玄関口、大矢野町の天草パールライン沿いにある道の駅。物産館で旬の農林水産物を、レストランで海鮮丼など天草の味を楽しめる。観光協会やバス発着所も併設。
descEn: At the gateway to the Amakusa region, along the Amakusa Pearl Line in Oyano Town. The market offers seasonal farm and marine products, and the restaurant serves Amakusa specialties like seafood rice bowls. Also houses a tourism office and bus terminal.
